steps.title: Identify the rate-distance-time relationship
steps.content: When an object travels at a constant rate, the distance covered equals the rate multiplied by the time elapsed.

steps.title: Calculate the distance flown
steps.content:
The pigeon flies at 16 meters per second for 4 seconds. Substituting into the formula:
$$D = 16 \text{ m/s} \times 4 \text{ s} = 64 \text{ m}$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
